_schema: plan-plecs-harness.md §3 — validation_status gates evidence: 'unvalidated' models may be run but may NOT close the PLECS evidence gate (SOP S1-S7).
_readback: PLECS 4.8 here returns empty simulate Values; read a ToFile CSV from disk. See procedure-simulation-and-validation.md §1 and memory plecs-readback-tofile.

models.device: library '2-Level IGBT Conv.' — ideal switches, Rth only, NO datasheet Eon/Eoff loss tables
not_yet: datasheet SiC loss/thermal description (Eon/Eoff/Econd vs V,I,Tj) + Foster net
DC-side ammeter for inverter efficiency (P_dc vs P_ac)
defined steady-state traction operating point (seed is mid-startup ramp, f_e~5Hz at 0.2s)
S1-S7 SOP + 9-corner matrix + Wolfspeed/TI CRD calibration (S5)

models.current_model_2026_07_21: experiments/2l-b6-800v-sic-bench/bench_2l_b6_800v_sic.plecs — purpose-fit 800V 2L-B6 built from the shipped three_phase_voltage_source_inverter demo retargeted to CAB450 (MosfetWithDiode x6, file:CAB450M12XM3, Ron=0.0036, struct('Rgon',4,'Rgoff',0)=datasheet-nominal Eon/Eoff). See its README.md. Supersedes the rainflow base for Track-1 (user chose a purpose-fit bench 2026-07-21).
models.operating_point_verified_2026_07_21: HEADLESS: Vdc=800V, phase current 357.5A rms (target 360), Pin=292.4kW (target ~300). Conduction-loss readout works + is T-dependent (73W@Tj0=0C -> 94W@Tj0=65C). Solver: dopri variable-step, RelTol 1e-5, MaxStep 1e-3; fs=16kHz, fac=200Hz, TimeSpan 0.05s. Loss-table source: system/env/models/wolfspeed/mosfet-with-diode/modules/CAB450M12XM3.xml (Version 4).
models.status: VALIDATED 2026-07-21; corner matrix COMPLETED 2026-07-23 — Step-1 model + 6 switched corners (S1-S5) + corners 6-9 (field-weakening/short-circuit/ASC/drive-cycle) + S6/S7 reconciliation done. Corners 6/8/9 machine/system-analytic grounded in the validated inverter data; corner 7 device-datasheet; PLECS contributes C6 speed-sweep + C9 loss map.
models.coupling_confirmed_2026_07_21: User GUI-created a Heat Sink over Q1-Q6 + wired port to Whf->Tcool->Tgnd. CONFIRMED: raising coolant 65->150C raised Q1 conduction 94->157W (junction tracks coolant => coupled). All 6 probed: conduction 170-243W each (all coupled, none runaway), total conduction 1233W; high/low-side asymmetry (high ~240W, low ~172W, PF effect). Coupling now survives text edits (headless from here).
models.preliminary_result_2026_07_21: At 800V / 357A rms / 292kW: per-switch (Q1, PeriodicAverage+PeriodicImpulseAverage over 1/fac) conduction ~205W + switching ~244W; inverter loss ~2.5-2.7kW; EFFICIENCY ~99.1% (clears CRD >98%, near 99.3% design est). PRELIMINARY: S1-S3 gates not run; Tj probe reads 0 (needs junction-to-coolant Rth+Cth thermal state); Whf heat-flow cross-check confounded by thermal transient (0.05s run); current crest factor ~1.8 (distorted, inflates switching loss); switching total should sum all 6 not x6-Q1.
models.validated_2026_07_21: Step-1 model complete + corner matrix (S1/S2/S3/S4/S5) run headless. Solver dopri, RelTol 1e-4, MaxStep 1e-4 (S1: identical to 1e-3, converged). SV PWM + Lg=0.5pu => clean current (crest 1.46, THD 0.15%). Loss chain: PeriodicAverage (all-6 conduction) + PeriodicImpulseAverage (all-6 switching), T=1/fac. Tj readout FIXED (signal 'Device junction temp'; 'MOSFET junction temp' gave no column) + series ThermalResistor Rcs for a readable sink state; reported Tj_ss is analytic (option b) since thermal timescale >> 0.05s switched run. Energy balance (S3) |resid|<0.6% all corners. Analytic conduction cross-check -3.5%. model_vars apply AFTER InitializationCommands => corners pass a full consistent var set (gen_vars.py). Results: results/metrics/2l-b6-800v-sic-bench.txt.
models.validated_result_2026_07_21: CRD point (C1: 800V/359A rms/302kW): eta=99.07% (clears CRD >98%), per-switch cond 208W + sw 262W, Sigma6 loss 2815W, Tj_ss=175C (matches CRD 175C via R_cs=0.070 C/W/module CRD-calibration; app-note R_cs=0.08 => 185C pessimistic), energy balance -0.37%.
models.validated_against: design-2l-b6-800v-sic (target) / reference-design-wolfspeed-ti-300kw-800v (S5 anchor: 99.07% eta + 175C both within tol)
models.device_model: plecs_models/wolfspeed/mosfet-with-diode/modules/CAB450M12XM3.xml (official Wolfspeed PLECS model, Version 4 2026-03-19; full Eon/Eoff/Err 4-D surface incl 800V@all Tj + Cauer net ~0.095 C/W)

corners_6_9_2026_07_23.C6_field_weakening: Analytic envelope (rep. 300kW IPMSM): base 5596rpm, peak 327kW, CPSR 2.4x, torque~w^-0.91 PASS, Vd^2+Vq^2<=Vmax^2 PASS (100% util). PLECS inverter confirmation at 750V/300kW over 1x-3x speed (fe 200/400/600Hz): eta FLAT 99.11-99.12%, crest 1.46->1.53, THD grows as pulse ratio 80->27. Script corner6_field_weakening.py.
corners_6_9_2026_07_23.C7_short_circuit: Datasheet/analytic (loss model has no gm-saturation -> can't do SC; 850/0.0036=236kA unphysical). CAB450 scaled from FM3 anchor: ID,sat~4.7kA (~10x rated), SCWT~2.73us@850V/175C (<3us SiC). DESAT+soft-off 1.3us inside SCWT 2.1x margin -> single SC SURVIVED. Turn-off dV: soft 63V / hard 313V (89% BV headroom) -> soft preferred. PASS. Script corner7_short_circuit.py.
corners_6_9_2026_07_23.C8_asc_entry: Analytic dq (bench can't model ASC). Steady ASC bounded at Ich=611A; entry transient 1924A=3.1x steady (>I_DM 900A -> flag staged ASC / SOA check); drag torque peaks 235N.m near 100rpm ~1/w; NO bus overvolt (fault current never reaches cap; freewheel would pump 1317V>850V). PASS: ASC=correct high-speed safe state. Script corner8_asc.py.
corners_6_9_2026_07_23.C9_drive_cycle: Averaged loss map (Pcond=9.585e-3*I^2 + Psw=5.974e-3*Vdc*I, fit to C1-C6 <8%) x US06/WLTP-class trace (280s/5km, rep 300kW BEV). Cycle-avg inverter eta 98.62% (below rated 99.07%: low-speed light-load switching floor), regen 604Wh. Tj history (Foster): peak 116C mean 80C (<175C). Rainflow 26 cyc, dTj max 28C. Script corner9_drive_cycle.py.
corners_6_9_2026_07_23.S6_S7_reconciliation: MET — the corner-9 averaged loss map reproduces the switched C1-C6 losses within <8% (target +/-10%). The averaged model IS the loss map.
corners_6_9_2026_07_23.scope: Machine params are representative 300kW IPMSM [T] (machine-and-load.md). Closed-loop FOC field-weakening + native PMSM ASC would upgrade C6/C8 to PLECS-confirmed (needs PMSM+FOC model, separate build). Full output: experiments/2l-b6-800v-sic-bench/plecs_runs/corners_6_9_output.txt.

models.loss_layer_status: ACTIVATED 2026-07-19 — official CAB450M12XM3 model loads+simulates on the library converter block. BUT the library block HIDES its per-device losses: SwitchLossCalculator (can't descend into the block) and PlecsProbe both read 0. A validated model needs DISCRETE Mosfet blocks (each therm=file:CAB450M12XM3, on a HeatSink) — recommended base: retarget the three_phase_grid_connected_pv_inverter (or t_type) thermal demo. See LOSS_LAYER_BUILD.md 'Structural fork'.
models.build_findings_2026_07_19: See data/plecs/HANDOFF.md. Device requires Type MosfetWithDiode (Mosfet/Igbt reject CAB450 gate-dependent conduction). Loss/Tj readout SOLVED: PlecsProbe with signal names 'Device conduction loss'/'Device switching loss'/'Device junction temp' -> ToFile (NOT 'MOSFET ...'). Device dissipates correctly (Ron=3.6mOhm verified electrically). BLOCKER: device->heatsink coupling does NOT reproduce from scratch-scripted .plecs (heatsink stays 25C, Tj runs away to 684C, heat flow 0) even copying the buck demo's byte-identical HeatSink+device geometry. Root cause: the coupling is a GUI-baked association (survives text-edits to a GUI-saved base -> buck+CAB450 gives 35.7W conduction, bounded Tj). No headless workaround (no plecs.save/add/connect in the 4.8 RPC surface).
models.method_for_all_topologies: Retarget a GUI-saved base that has discrete switches on heat sinks (coupling survives text edits); do NOT author on-heatsink devices from scratch.
models.base_2l_b6: data/plecs/2l_b6_rainflow_base/2l_b6_cab450_rainflow.plecs — the rainflow_counting demo (6 IGBT+6 diode 2L VSI + IM on a heat sink) retargeted headlessly to CAB450. LOADS+SIMULATES ok:true, and device->heatsink COUPLING CONFIRMED: Tj=65.3C mean, bounded at ambient Ta=65C (uncoupled would run away to 684C). Uses legacy-mosfets/CAB450M12XM3.xml (class MOSFET, plain conduction -> plain Mosfet block) + CustomVariables Rgon/Rgoff + CAB450M12XM3_bodydiode. Tj readout: top-level PlecsProbe Component 'IGBT1' Path 'Circuit' signal 'MOSFET junction temp'.
models.validation_status_note: 2026-07-21 UPDATE (supersedes the rainflow-scale problem): switched to a purpose-fit 800V bench that HITS the CRD operating point (360A rms / 292kW / 800V) headless. Now blocked on ONE manual step: device->heat-sink coupling. PROVEN 5 ways (PLECS 4.8 manual pp.318-9 RPC-command list + p.166 heat-sink concept; plecs.get shows no heat-sink device param; byte-identical geometry test GUI-buck-couples-vs-hand-DPT-doesnt; Plexim forum) that coupling CANNOT be scripted -- it is GUI-established spatial enclosure. Also: PLECS refuses to probe loss/Tj unless the device is on a heat sink. => user must drag Q1..Q6 onto the HS box in the GUI + save (see bench README), then the rest is headless. Switching-loss readout method now known: PeriodicImpulseAverage (memory plecs-loss-readback-periodicimpulseaverage).
next_steps_after_coupling: add PeriodicImpulseAverage(T=1/fac) on Device switching loss + PeriodicAverage on conduction
read temperature-correct per-switch loss + Tj; inverter loss = 6x (balanced); eta=Pout/Pin, energy-balanced (S3)
